violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed worker placing raw beef patties on the flat-top and then handling burger buns without washing their hands.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Raw sausage links were stored above the reach in cooler in the kitchen. Raw steak was stored about ready to eat foods in the back reach-in cooler storage.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Towels being used for wiping down the prep area were left out on the tables, not stored in sanitizer solution or disposed of after immediate use. Sanitizer bucket sitting next to the 3 compartment sink measured 0ppm.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Shelf used to store sheet pans has been covered in foil, foil is peeling and is not a smooth easily cleanable surface.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave in the kitchen needs to be cleaned.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Ice scoop was being scored on top of the ice machine. Utensils by the microwave have the food contact surface face up and need to be inverted.
Laundered, proper handling, and storage (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Appropriate procedures (2 pts deducted)
